citation: Yala A, Mikhael PG, Strand F, et al. Multi-Institutional Validation of a Mammography-Based Breast Cancer Risk Model. J Clin Oncol. 2022;40(16):1732-1740.
case_summary: Multi-institutional validation showed variable performance across racial subgroups for breast cancer risk prediction.
